extName.message: Keepr Notes — Timestamped notes for YouTube

extDesc.message: Take timestamped notes on YouTube. 100% local — your notes live on your disk and survive even if the extension stops being updated.

videoPlaceholder.message: Open a YouTube video to take notes…

emptyNotes.message: No notes yet. Press + Note here, the player button, or Alt+N while watching.

emptyLib.message: No notes saved on any video yet.

backupHint.message: Everything is stored only on this device. Make a backup so it survives anything.

openVideoToJump.message: Open the video in a tab to jump

openVideoToAdd.message: Open the video to add notes

welcomeSubtitle.message: Timestamped notes for YouTube that live on your own disk.

step1Body.message: Keepr adds a small note button to the player controls.

step2Body.message: Click the player button or press Alt+N. The current second is saved instantly.

step3Body.message: Click the Keepr icon in the toolbar. Click any note to jump back to that moment. Export to Markdown or back up anytime.

welcomePrivacy.message: No account, no servers, no tracking. Your notes never leave your device.

optDataHint.message: Notes are stored locally on this device only. Back them up regularly.

optShortcutBody.message: In the player: Alt+N. You can also set a global shortcut from your browser's extension shortcuts page.

optAboutBody.message: Keepr Notes is local-first and open source. It requests minimal permissions and never sends your data anywhere.
